mapper.sql: vip_benefit_id AS vipBenefitId, user_id AS userId, origin_user_id AS originUserId, vip_card_id AS vipCardId, source_order_no AS sourceOrderNo, store_id AS storeId, store_addr_id AS storeAddrId, origin_price AS originPrice, start_time AS startTime, expire_time AS expireTime, status, transfer_count AS transferCount, transferable, created_date AS createdDate
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO vip_benefit
user_id, origin_user_id, vip_card_id, source_order_no, store_id, store_addr_id, origin_price, start_time, expire_time, status, transfer_count, transferable,
#{userId}, #{originUserId}, #{vipCardId}, #{sourceOrderNo}, #{storeId}, #{storeAddrId}, #{originPrice}, #{startTime}, #{expireTime}, #{status}, #{transferCount}, #{transferable},
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vip_benefit WHERE vip_benefit_id = #{vipBenefitId} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM vip_benefit WHERE vip_benefit_id = #{vipBenefitId} LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
SELECT FROM vip_benefit WHERE source_order_no = #{orderNo} LIMIT 1
SELECT c.vip_card_id AS vipCardId, c.validity_days AS validityDays FROM vip_benefit b JOIN vip_benefit_card c ON b.vip_card_id = c.vip_card_id WHERE b.source_order_no = #{orderNo} LIMIT 1
